title: My algo trading bot
author: Upstairs_Basis2342
selftext:
Here is one system I build with my friend it works under prop firms rules its kinda a big deal. Its not that their challange is passable but this bot did it. couple time for now more to come.

Call it whatever you want but calling and using fancy words while describing your robot is obnocsous. 

I will not name tech used for building it you can keep guesing. Its not for sale only for rent. Subscription is best buisness model.

My friend and I are using it to get funds from prop firms. That is not an option for rent own capital and risk can be adjusted.

To be more impresive these results are fixed lot size. Prop oriented. But doesnt need to be that way if someone what to scale it can be done it has news filter and intervention blocker from big bank its nice to catch a big wave its bad to be drowned in one.

It has 4.4 % drawdown and over 54% in a lil over seven moths of work on a 1:30 leverage yeah only 30 trading EURUSD other counterpart had like 46 trading GBPUSD. 

Yeah its demo acc 10k but keep in mind its only 0.5 Lot size. I am open to any questions

comments.author: GallegoTrading
comments.body: If you'd like, we can see if it works and put it into a live account. I have client accounts running with their own capital, nothing funded. If you want to start generating profits and move beyond demos, we can discuss it, as I'm expanding my EA portfolio. Thank you very much, take care!

replies.author: grom23
replies.body: Ok but send me private DM half is mine half is friends I will not keep all for myself he will be for it. DM is so we can negotiate further

replies.author: grom23
replies.body: P.S. I am putting it micro accs and yes your offer is tempting

comments.author: real_yggdrasil
comments.body:
Please explain:

What has the fact that you are trading with funded accounts gave to do with the quality of your trades? Ik looks like a trick to lure people into funder accounts trading.

Íf i dont see this right, then please elaborate.

replies.author: Upstairs_Basis2342
replies.body: Rules. Robot Passed them on auto pilot max Daily drawdown 5% and max overall drawdown 10% it didnt fall bellow 90% trading day for robot doesnt mean much it didt risk like crazy thats the point if someone has live acc than this bot is for him battle tested in prop firm watters

replies.author: Upstairs_Basis2342
replies.body: dont belive me check on myfxbook detailed report

comments.author: Comprehensive_Rip768
comments.body: I use [algofleet.trade](http://algofleet.trade) for scalping. so far no complains.
